name: vortos/vortos-aws-ses
description: Vortos AWS SES email delivery with transactional outbox, suppression lists, webhooks, and observability

suggest.vortos/vortos-tracing: Required for AWS SES tracing middleware
suggest.vortos/vortos-metrics: Required for AWS SES metrics middleware
suggest.vortos/vortos-docker: Required for vortos:worker:* supervisor management commands
